Interface IAlertForm

Represent an alert window.

The IAlertForm interface is implemented by the PhiRobotics UI library and is not intended to be implemented by consumer code.

Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI.AlertPanels
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public interface IAlertForm

Properties

AlertPanelInfo

Gets the basic information about alert panel displayed in the form.

Declaration
IAlertPanelInfo AlertPanelInfo { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
IAlertPanelInfo

CurrentScreen

Gets the screen on which the alert form is currently displayed.

Declaration
Screen CurrentScreen { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
Screen

Opacity

Gets or sets the opacity of the alert form.

Declaration
double Opacity { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
double

Tag

Gets an object that contains data about the alert form.

Declaration
object Tag { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
object
